arts.ttl: Denmark v Sweden: Women’s Euro 2025 – live
arts.sum: Updates from this Group C match (5pm BST kick-off) Mail Barry | Interactive player guide | Wallchart Sweden team guide: Filippa Angeldahl, Stina Blackstenius and Johanna Rytting Kaneryd are among the world-class talents who will spearhead Sweden’s campaign. Words: Ella Lindvall. Denmark team guide: Pernille Harder will lead from the front but Germany and Sweden are favourites to progress from Group C, writes Sofie Engberg Munch. Continue reading...
